content_body: Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful, warm, and inviting home with us. We loved the fall decorations! The highlights of my mornings were spent on the porch gazing at the spectacular mountain vistas while sipping on coffee. We had a fabulous week visiting the apple festival in Ellijay, Mercier Orchards, hiking at Amicalola Falls, riding the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway, and checking out the new restaurants in town. We were blessed with a beautiful week of weather. Wonderful memories!
title: Wonderful Memories!
